embed.title: !start
embed.description: Resume alert delivery after you've paused it with `{{prefix}}stop`.

fields.name: Usage
fields.value: `{{prefix}}start` — re-enable alerts. Your tracking rules are preserved while alerts are paused, so this immediately resumes the alerts you had before.

fields.name: Related
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}stop` — pause alerts without losing your tracking rules
`{{prefix}}poracle` — full registration (new users)
